title: Cheiridopsis minor
taxonomy: Cheiridopsis minor is a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. It belongs to the genus Cheiridopsis, which is a group of succulent plants native to the southern regions of Africa. The Aizoaceae family, also known as the ice plant family, consists of various succulent and flowering plants that are commonly found in arid and semi-arid regions. Cheiridopsis minor is often classified as a succulent plant with small, white flowers and fleshy leaves. This classification places it within the broader category of succulent plants native to the arid regions of Africa.
